focus: Foundation: database schema, board members, authorization refactor
summary: Created all 4 new social interaction tables, added user_id to activity, implemented board_members API endpoints, and refactored authorization from single-owner to membership-based. 18 new tests, all 241 pass.

focus: Comments API — CRUD with authorization, activity logging, auto-watch
summary: Implemented POST/PATCH/DELETE comment endpoints with three-tier authorization, activity logging on comment creation, and auto-watch via INSERT OR IGNORE. 15 new tests added, all 256 pass.
